attributes.action: Get adam back on the drink
attributes.additional_details: I want the government to get adam back on the drink. There's lads down the pub all talking about how great he was on the drink. Ive never seen a man like it on the drink. Absolute demon on the drink. The government should make this a major priority and get adam back on the drink
attributes.background: Adam used to be great craic on the drink. In fact he was unbelievable on the drink. Its about time adam got back on the drink
